wellness.title: Arrive & Breathe
wellness.body: Before you start, take 3 slow breaths. In for 4 counts, hold for 4, out for 6. Notice how your body already feels a little lighter. Today is about presence, not pace.

activity.title: Set an Intention
activity.body: As a team, each person shares one word for how they want to feel by the end of the walk. No wrong answers.

wellness.title: Grounding (5-4-3-2-1)
wellness.body: Pause under the shelter. Name 5 things you can see, 4 you can hear, 3 you can feel, 2 you can smell, 1 you can taste. This simple exercise pulls a busy mind back into the present.

activity.title: Sound Map
activity.body: Stand silently for 60 seconds. Afterward, each teammate names the one sound they noticed that no one else mentioned.

wellness.title: Play is Good for You
wellness.body: Play lowers cortisol and boosts mood. You're allowed to be a kid for a minute. There's a playground right here — use it.

activity.title: Playground Pause
activity.body: Spend 2 minutes on the playground as a team. Laughter is mandatory. Take a silly group action shot.

wellness.title: Three Good Things
wellness.body: Gratitude is one of the most reliable mood-boosters there is. Bring to mind three things that went well recently — they can be tiny.

activity.title: One Good Thing
activity.body: Each teammate shares one good thing — at work or in life — from the past week. Keep it light.

wellness.title: Widen Your View
wellness.body: Gazing at a wide, distant scene like the quarry relaxes the eyes and the nervous system. Soften your focus and take in the whole view for a moment.

activity.title: The Swing Forfeit
activity.body: The teammate who has walked the LEAST distance so far takes the swing at Lookout Point — and gets a cheer from the team. Everyone else takes the photo.

wellness.title: You Made It
wellness.body: Reaching the end together is the whole point. Notice how the group feels now versus at the Visitor Centre. That shift is what the walk was for.

activity.title: Group Photo at the Quarry
activity.body: Gather the whole team for a group photo with the quarry behind you. Upload it below to complete your journey.
